betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Soldering Station§f

§aThe machine that turns raw components into circuit boards. Built at a Tier 2 Anvil.§f

§6Materials§f (all in JEI):
§b• 2 Cast Steel Plate§f — from the anvil
§b• 4 Copper Coil§f — copper wire coiled
§b• 4 Tungsten Bolt§f — machined tungsten
§b• 2 Vacuum Tube§f — from Circuit Components

§6Uses§f:
§b• Analog Circuit Board§f — first circuit, gate to all mid-game
§b• Machine Upgrades§f — Speed/Effectiveness/Overclock upgrades
§b• Higher circuit tiers§f — unlocks at the Soldering Station

Consumes 100 HE/t for basic recipes, more for upgrades.

§eTip§f: Power the station and feed it capacitors, PCBs, and lead wire. Check JEI for all recipes.
